rules.rule: Changes to JWT verification require observed evidence (passing integration tests with real token flows)
rules.rationale: Auth failures are P0 incidents — likely evidence is insufficient

rules.rule: Changes to subscription renewal or Stripe handlers require at least likely evidence (unit tests covering happy path + error cases)
rules.rationale: Financial operations need strong test coverage before merge

rules.rule: Changes to shared-utils or validation package require observed evidence (all downstream consumers tested)
rules.rationale: Shared packages have blast radius across all services

rules.rule: Changes to notification queue require likely evidence (queue processor tests with mock channels)
rules.rationale: Queue failures cause silent notification drops

rules.rule: Changes to webhook retry logic require possible evidence minimum (at least one test showing retry behavior)
rules.rationale: Retry changes affect all outbound webhook delivery
